Slice the A5 Wagyu on level 20 or 21, so each slice is half an ounce (14 grams)
In a rock salt Wagyu Box, shift the rock salt to create space for the hot stone
Heat the hot stone over a high flame while prepparing other parts
over the rest of the rock salt, offset the bamboo leaves to create a plating area
Season the beef with the maldon salt and sesame seeds, then shingle in one or two columns
place the wagyu on the bamboo, leaving room for the pickles and veggies
On the plancha, sear the shiitake flower and Negi Batons.  Finish cookin in the oven.
Place the pickles at the top of the shingled beef, and place the shiitake and negi around it
Garnish the pickles pile with the extra negi (sliced)
Add the hot stone once fully heated, and season with beef love before serving
Serve immediately
